name: MyStaySite
description: Professional website development for vacation rentals, villas, studios and apartments. Direct bookings, SEO, reviews integration, and Google Business Profile optimization for accommodation owners in Greece.

capabilities.name: Get started / Request quote
capabilities.description: Prospective customers can request a quote or book a free consultation for a new accommodation website.

capabilities.name: Browse services
capabilities.description: See all available services: website development, SEO, Google Ads, Google Business Profile, analytics consulting, property management, website audit, social media.

capabilities.name: View portfolio case study
capabilities.description: Detailed before/after case study of a real client website redesign (Achilleas Peaceful Place, Sithonia, Halkidiki).

capabilities.name: Read blog articles
capabilities.description: SEO, website optimization, direct booking strategy, and tourism marketing articles for accommodation owners.

capabilities.name: Contact via WhatsApp
capabilities.description: Start a WhatsApp conversation with pre-filled message for a website quote.

capabilities.name: Call directly
capabilities.description: Phone number for direct voice contact.

services.name: Starter Website
services.description: One-page website with photos, SEO basics, SSL, and Google Business Profile. Delivered in 2-5 days.

services.name: Professional Website
services.description: Full website with booking system, reviews section, 2 languages, Google Analytics, and photo gallery.

services.name: Premium Digital Setup
services.description: Complete digital setup with online payments, iCal sync, 3+ languages, blog, copywriting, Google Ads, social media, and PMS integration.
